headline: Is AppLovin Corporation (APP) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is APP a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on AppLovin Corporation on r/stocks by PinPsychological82. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on APP. AppLovin Corporation’s share was trading at $502.14 as of March 6th. APP’s trailing and forward P/E were 50.01 and 33.78, respectively according to Yahoo Finance. AppLovin Corporation provides […]
